case_title: FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION VS. GREGORY E CRUIKSHANK et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION SERVED SEP-09-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CRUIKSHANK, GREGORY E
DECLARATION ANDREW FORD FILED RE: ATTORNEY IN SUPPORT OF COURT COSTS PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUIKSHANK, GREGORY E $2,323.94 PRINCIPAL, $302.43 INTEREST, $245.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,871.37, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-04-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CRUIKSHANK, GREGORY E DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2009
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CRUIKSHANK, GREGORY E
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-20, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION ANGEL PAGE FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION
DECLARATION ANDREW FORD FILED RE: ATTORNEY IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF JURISDICTIONAL FACTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
